tasks.subject: Task 0: Workspace shell
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Make `browser/` a published-but-empty workspace package whose toolchain is wired to the repo root.

**Files:**
- Modify: `package.json` (root) — add `"workspaces": ["browser"]`
- Create: `browser/package.json`, `browser/tsconfig.json`, `browser/tsup.config.ts`, `browser/vitest.config.ts`, `browser/README.md`, `browser/src/index.ts` (placeholder)

**Verify:** `npm install && npm run build --workspace @livefolio/yfinance-browser && npm test --workspace @livefolio/yfinance-browser && npm test`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["package.json", "browser/package.json", "browser/tsconfig.json", "browser/tsup.config.ts", "browser/vitest.config.ts", "browser/README.md", "browser/src/index.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npm install && npm run build --workspace @livefolio/yfinance-browser && npm test --workspace @livefolio/yfinance-browser && npm test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["npm install creates yfinance-browser workspace symlink", "build produces browser/dist/index.{js,d.ts}", "yfinance-browser test passes with no tests", "root npm test still passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: assetToYahooSymbol helper
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure function mapping a v0.4 `Asset` to the symbol string Yahoo's WebSocket expects, with TDD.

**Files:**
- Create: `browser/src/asset.ts`, `browser/src/asset.test.ts`

**Verify:** `npm test --workspace @livefolio/yfinance-browser -- asset.test`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["browser/src/asset.ts", "browser/src/asset.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npm test --workspace @livefolio/yfinance-browser -- asset.test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["plain SPY passes through", "BRK.B becomes BRK-B", "non-equity kind throws with kind in message"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: decodeTicker protobuf decoder
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Hand-rolled protobuf decoder for Yahoo's PricingData message — fields id (1), price (2), time (3, sint64), lastSize (22, sint64). Skip others via wire-type-aware advancement.

**Files:**
- Create: `browser/src/decode-ticker.ts`, `browser/src/decode-ticker.test.ts`

**Verify:** `npm test --workspace @livefolio/yfinance-browser -- decode-ticker.test`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["browser/src/decode-ticker.ts", "browser/src/decode-ticker.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npm test --workspace @livefolio/yfinance-browser -- decode-ticker.test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["round-trip id/price/time/lastSize", "skips unknown fields across all wire types", "lastSize undefined when absent", "negative time round-trips via zigzag", "unknown wire type terminates gracefully"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: YfinanceStreamingDataFeed — single-subscriber happy path
tasks.description:
**Goal:** First working version of the class — lazy connect, one subscribe() call, ticks yielded as StreamingBar, breaking the loop tears the socket down. Data structures designed for the full design upfront.

**Files:**
- Create: `browser/src/yfinance-streaming-data-feed.ts`, `browser/src/yfinance-streaming-data-feed.test.ts`

**Verify:** `npm test --workspace @livefolio/yfinance-browser -- yfinance-streaming-data-feed.test`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["browser/src/yfinance-streaming-data-feed.ts", "browser/src/yfinance-streaming-data-feed.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npm test --workspace @livefolio/yfinance-browser -- yfinance-streaming-data-feed.test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["lazy connect", "subscribe message on open", "BRK.B → BRK-B", "tick yields full StreamingBar", "volume defaults to 0 when lastSize absent", "drops unsubscribed/empty-id ticks", "break closes socket"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Multi-subscriber refcounting
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Two subscribe() calls share one WebSocket; symbol stays subscribed until last consumer detaches.

**Files:**
- Modify: `browser/src/yfinance-streaming-data-feed.test.ts` (append tests)
- Modify: `browser/src/yfinance-streaming-data-feed.ts` (Task 3's data structures already support this; fix only if a test fails)

**Verify:** `npm test --workspace @livefolio/yfinance-browser`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["browser/src/yfinance-streaming-data-feed.test.ts", "browser/src/yfinance-streaming-data-feed.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npm test --workspace @livefolio/yfinance-browser", "acceptanceCriteria": ["one shared socket across calls", "shared symbols deliver to both", "partial detach keeps socket open", "full detach closes socket", "new symbol re-sends subscribe", "tracked-only symbol no re-send", "refcount→0 sends trimmed subscribe"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Reconnection with backoff + onStatus callback
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Exponential backoff reconnect (500→1000→…→8000ms cap), reset on successful open, re-send full subscription, lifecycle status callback.

**Files:**
- Modify: `browser/src/yfinance-streaming-data-feed.ts`, `browser/src/yfinance-streaming-data-feed.test.ts`

**Verify:** `npm test --workspace @livefolio/yfinance-browser`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["browser/src/yfinance-streaming-data-feed.ts", "browser/src/yfinance-streaming-data-feed.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npm test --workspace @livefolio/yfinance-browser", "acceptanceCriteria": ["status lifecycle reconnecting→connected→disconnected", "exponential backoff 500/1000/2000ms", "delay capped at maxReconnectDelayMs", "successful connect resets backoff", "full subscription re-sent after reconnect", "iterator stays alive across gap", "throwing onStatus isolated"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: onError callback + close() method
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Surface decode/socket errors via onError; iterator never throws. close() terminates iterators cleanly and prevents reconnects.

**Files:**
- Modify: `browser/src/yfinance-streaming-data-feed.ts`, `browser/src/yfinance-streaming-data-feed.test.ts`

**Verify:** `npm test --workspace @livefolio/yfinance-browser`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["browser/src/yfinance-streaming-data-feed.ts", "browser/src/yfinance-streaming-data-feed.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npm test --workspace @livefolio/yfinance-browser", "acceptanceCriteria": ["onError on decode failure, iteration continues", "onError on socket error", "throwing onError isolated", "close() resolves waiters with done:true", "close() prevents reconnect", "subscribe after close returns done iterator", "close() idempotent"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Public index.ts and final verification
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Publish public surface; run lint/format/build/test as the final gate.

**Files:**
- Modify: `browser/src/index.ts`

**Verify:** `npm run lint --workspace @livefolio/yfinance-browser && npm run format:check --workspace @livefolio/yfinance-browser && npm test --workspace @livefolio/yfinance-browser && npm run build --workspace @livefolio/yfinance-browser && npm test`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["browser/src/index.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npm run lint --workspace @livefolio/yfinance-browser && npm run format:check --workspace @livefolio/yfinance-browser && npm test --workspace @livefolio/yfinance-browser && npm run build --workspace @livefolio/yfinance-browser && npm test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["five exports in index.ts", "dist/index.d.ts contains all exports", "lint clean", "format:check clean", "all yfinance-browser tests pass", "root npm test passes"]}
```
